star_1.text: Is one of those games where no matter how far you run, when you die you start all over again. And the ads in this game is very very very excessive. You have to watch an ad for everything, now that's a lot of ad's. But as soon as you die they still throw one at you. Another thing, you watch ad's to put a special corrector together, or even pay for one. Turns out it performs just like the others. No special skills nothing special about it. It turns out to be a waist after a time.

After i had reached level 7 the game just took me back to level 1. Lost all progress. Up to now i do not understand what happened.

star_2.text: I was enjoying the game untill I reach at level 31 and I can't go further nor play anymore. Each time I start the gate, it seems there is a scratch and everything is pulse . I try all I could but no way and even updated the gate still no improvement and equally it stops every time and freeze as well which affects my phone negatively. I think am left with no choice than to uninstall it

Game doesn't register swipes consistently, so no matter how good you are, you don't get very far because it still has you running into walls. Only running game I've played that does it. Hopefully gets fixed because other than that, it's a fun game.

I loved it til the latest update came out. If you have a full boost power-up and use it whenever you enter the rock climb or waterfall you WILL lose the speed invincible boost. Also runner sticks a lot in the rock climb and won't move to right or left to dodge rocks and obstacles. Please fix this..
